description_long: This is a plastic beverage bottle with a contoured shape and a black label featuring the Pepsi Max branding. The bottle has a screw cap with a black top and a colored Pepsi logo, and the body is slightly translucent, revealing a faint outline of the liquid inside. The label wraps around the midsection, displaying nutritional information, branding, and product details in white, red, and blue colors. The lower part of the bottle is ribbed for grip, and the base is slightly indented for stability. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage or deformation. The bottle is typical of single-serve soft drink containers found in urban environments.
description: A contoured plastic Pepsi Max bottle with a black screw cap and a black label featuring colorful branding and nutritional information. The bottle is slightly translucent and ribbed for grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepsi Max logo, black label, and screw cap with the Pepsi logo on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the nutritional information and barcode on the label, with the cap's colored logo visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detailed product information and barcode on the label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the Pepsi Max logo and a portion of the nutritional label, with the cap's logo visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi Max logo in red, white, and blue on a black label, with nutritional information, barcode, and product details in white text. The cap also features the Pepsi logo in color.
